---
title: "Statistical Methods Final Project"
author: "Kyle Urban, James Joyner, Brennon"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  html_document:
     code_folding: show
     theme: flatly
     highlight: tango
     toc: yes
     number_sections: yes
     df_print: paged
     toc_float: true
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

Loading packages
```{r warning=F, message=F}
library(tidyverse)

```

```{r}
DATA <- read_csv("Teen_Mental_Health_Dataset.csv")

DATA
```
